heading: New facilities
label: 12146 New facilities
text: For purposes of and , it shall be considered discrimination for a public entity to construct a new facility to be used in the provision of designated public transportation services unless such facility is readily accessible to and usable by individuals with disabilities, including individuals who use wheelchairs.section 12132 of this titlesection 794 of title 29
notes: Effective DateSection effective 18 months after , see , set out as a note under .July 26, 1990section 231(a) of Pub. L. 101–336section 12141 of this title
